ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., football, basketball, hockey) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee or officials */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., kickoff, pass, rush) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the play */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the play */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "play_sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the play within the game */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, turnover, penalty) */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Any penalty associated with the play */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Number of yards penalized */,
  "penalty_team" TEXT /* Team that committed the penalty */,
  "penalty_player" TEXT /* Player who committed the penalty */,
  "play_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the play */,
  "play_location" TEXT /* Location on the field where the play started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college_university" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_state" (
  "game_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the state belongs to */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score (e.g., 0-0, 14-7) */,
  "play_clock" TEXT /* Play clock time remaining in the quarter */,
  "possession_team" TEXT /* Team in possession of the ball */,
  "down_and_distance" TEXT /* Down and distance (e.g., 3rd and 10) */,
  "field_position" TEXT /* Current field position */,
  "timeouts_remaining_home" INTEGER /* Number of timeouts remaining for the home team */,
  "timeouts_remaining_away" INTEGER /* Number of timeouts remaining for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_sequence" (
  "play_sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play sequence */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play */,
  "previous_play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous play */,
  "next_play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next play */,
  "play_sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the play within the game */,
  "play_order" INTEGER /* Order of the play in the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_sequence_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_sequence_next_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("next_play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_sequence_previous_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_involvement" (
  "play_involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play involvement */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the play (e.g., passer, receiver, tackler) */,
  "play_role_type" TEXT /* Type of role the player had in the play (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "play_role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the player's role in the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_involvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_involvement_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_involvement_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., passes completed, yards rushed) */,
  "statistic_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "game_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the statistic was recorded */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team for which the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_statistics" (
  "play_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play statistic */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., yards gained, tackles made) */,
  "statistic_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "play_quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the statistic was recorded */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team for which the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_statistics_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
